text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: I propose... a challenge.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Yes! We talked it over, and I'm all for the idea as
well.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Our last joint training session proved fruitful for
all of us, did it not?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I think that if we continue finding ways to
challenge each other, then it can only lead to
more growth.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Yeah. So please... If you would.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They didn't have any particular criteria in mind
for our little showdown, so I get to pick.
choice_data_list: Let's see who has more speed!
Let's see who has more stamina!
Let's see who has more power!
Let's see who has more guts!
Let's see who has more wit!
Let's see who has more energy!

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Speed... Time to become the wind. Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Stamina... I'm gonna run a lot. A whole lot.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Power... You know, I've really bulked up recently.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
Guts... I can do this... With Trainer's cheers to
keep me going.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
Wit... I'll show you just how many brain cells I can
fire at once.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Energy... Yeah, I think I've got plenty of it.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Defeat... Oof.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, Meek. I saw you give it your all out
there, and I even got plenty of data out of it.
Let's work on it tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for training with us! We'll be looking
forward to the next opportunity!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
<chrname> is beaming after her win.
Let's aim for victory next time too!

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Nghhh... I'm sorry, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Oh Meek, please don't worry about it. It was me
who was underprepared for this session. Next
time, for sure!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for training with us! Until next time,
then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before Happy Meek dashes off, I sense a certain
fire in her eyes. One very much the same as that I
can see in Trainer Kiryuin's.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
<chrname> is just as motivated as
ever after her successive victory. We immediately
begin to prepare for our next face-off.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: I won. Yippee. Thank you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
It was all you, Meek! Let's stop by your favorite
bakery on the way back today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Happy Meek made for some tough competition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but notice <chrname>'s
shoulders slump in disappointment.
